prompt: Consistent character model pack for a historical picture book. Same single young adult colonial soldier in every image, approximately 18-20 years old, slim build, narrow jaw, soft youthful features, anxious steady eyes, medium-small straight nose, clean-shaven, short brown hair under a worn tricorn hat. Keep identity highly consistent across outputs. Brighter painterly lighting: soft moonlit key plus gentle warm fill so facial features are readable. Half-body portrait variations only (front, 3/4 left, 3/4 right, profile), subtle expression changes (alert, worried, determined, reflective). Off-white/gray shirt and brown strap, historical realism, textured brushwork, plain unobtrusive background, no violence, no text.
